The '''''Enforcer''''' was a [[Neutron Star-class bulk cruiser/Legends|''Neutron Star''-class bulk cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Winstel Greelanx]] that participated in the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]]. ''Enforcer'', along with [[Inexorable (Neutron Star-class)|''Inexorable'']], formed the rear of the assault force's wedge formation.

{{Ship-stub}}
